hook.summary: A male UGC creator introduces 'Amikin Village' with high energy, using a split-screen format to show gameplay.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen layout with a male creator talking to the camera at the top and gameplay footage at the bottom.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Descubrí Amikin Village y es muy divertido.

scene_flow: UGC creator introduces Amikin Village, highlighting its fun factor.
Gameplay footage demonstrates the core loop of collecting creatures and building a village.
The scene transitions to a snowy environment showing character interaction and special effects.
The creator concludes by stating he intended to just try it but is now hooked.
audience_proxy: Spanish-speaking male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy creature-collection and survival RPGs.
